title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 is a major release introducing a native desktop app for macOS, Linux, and Windows, remote gateway support for server connections, an improved web dashboard with admin controls, fuzzy model search, and enhanced security with SSRF and subprocess protections.
